title: Graduate School of Addiction and Forensic Sciences Main Principles
content:
Graduate School of Addiction and Forensic Sciences Main Principles

Mission

In order to respond to the developing forensic science needs of the society;

•To offer non-formal learning environments with its expert academic staff, laboratories and research centers,

• To train experts and scientists who are compatible with R&D focuses, adhere to ethical values, creative, universal, and can direct forensic science and science policies.

Vision

To be a respected and preferred education and research institution in cooperation with national and international graduate-schools.

Foundation and Purpose

The Graduate School of Addiction and Forensic Sciences was established on April 09.2016 and firstly, students were admitted to the Master's programs of the Department of Forensic Sciences in the 2016-2017 academic year.

Our graduate-school aims to train respected, creative and universal scientists who are preferred at national and international level, and competent experts in their fields by using the experience and knowledge of our university in the fields of behavioral and health sciences with its distinguished teaching staff.
